name: Sri
description: Grand and heroic; an aristocratic king seated on a terrace.

children.name: Asavari
children.description: A wild, ascetic woman sitting on a mountaintop, charming snakes with her flute.

musicalMutation.description: Introduces a flat 2nd (Db4) to create a hypnotic, undulating melody.
Jumps erratically between the lower and upper registers.

children.name: Gauri
children.description: A woman wandering in the autumn woods, holding wands of blossoming flowers.

musicalMutation.description: Rests heavily on the 5th note (G4) to create a feeling of golden, autumnal stability.

children.name: Bairavi
children.description: A devotee offering white lotuses to a Shiva lingam at dawn.

children.name: Karnati
children.description: A regal woman reading a manuscript by the light of an oil lamp.

children.name: Sindhavi
children.description: A passionate woman confronting her lover after a night of betrayal.
